title: thymus zygis var. tenuifolius
intro: Thymus zygis var. tenuifolius, also known as Spanish Thyme, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Spanish Thyme include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Spanish Thyme is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
